sidebar.name: AbduKader
sidebar.title: Fullstack Developer
sidebar.tagline: I build accessible, performant, and polished web experiences.

about.tagline: I design fast, accessible, and reliable web interfaces, with careful attention to user experience and code quality.

bio.paragraph1: I enjoy turning complex ideas into clear, maintainable, and pleasant web products.
bio.paragraph2: My approach combines frontend attention to detail with a pragmatic understanding of APIs, data, and backend constraints.
bio.paragraph3: This portfolio will progressively evolve with my real experience, selected projects, and technical notes.

description: Epic 6 placeholder: designed Angular interfaces focused on performance, accessibility, and maintainability.
Structured user flows with reusable components, clear states, and API integration.
Collaborated with stakeholders to turn business needs into reliable web deliverables.
Epic 6 placeholder: developed Angular application modules for an internal platform.
Integrated REST services, improved forms, and managed interface-side state.
Contributed to code reviews, SCSS quality, and responsive refinements.
Epic 6 placeholder: built responsive web pages from existing mockups and guidelines.
Maintained HTML, SCSS, and JavaScript components with attention to accessibility.
Helped ship small features and maintain technical documentation.
